hero.title: Cerritos Beach, where the Pacific slows down.
hero.subtitle: Steady waves, long sunsets, a small community. The official guide to visit, surf, live and discover Cerritos.

hotels.title: Hotels
hotels.description: From budget hostels to beachfront haciendas. Filter by location, price and amenities.

surf.title: Surf
surf.description: Wave height, period, wind and tide. Lessons and board rentals.

food.title: Food
food.description: Restaurants, food trucks and markets. From fish tacos to chef-driven cuisine.

news.title: What's happening
news.description: Events, local news, beach alerts and a monthly newsletter.

community.title: Community
community.description: Meet who lives in and visits Cerritos. Posts, events and emergency contacts.

realestate.title: Real estate
realestate.description: Properties for sale and rent. From condos to beachfront lots.

newsletter.title: What's happening in Cerritos, in your inbox.
newsletter.subtitle: One email a month with swell conditions, community events, new hotels and real estate opportunities. No spam, no aggressive marketing.

hotels.title: Hotels in Cerritos
hotels.subtitle: A curated selection of the best places to stay, from hostels to private villas.

surf.title: Surf in Cerritos
surf.subtitle: Waves year-round. Best in fall and winter when north swells arrive.

shops.title: Surf schools and rentals
shops.subtitle: The locals who know the spot better than anyone.

food.title: Food in Cerritos
food.subtitle: From roadside fish tacos to chef-driven cuisine with ocean views.

news.title: What's happening in Cerritos
news.subtitle: Events, local news, beach alerts and articles from the team.

community.title: Cerritos community
community.subtitle: Connect with who lives, works and visits Cerritos. Local forums to find, offer and stay in the loop.

waitlist.title: Stay in the loop
waitlist.subtitle: We'll let you know when we enable events, lost & found or reports. No spam.

onboarding.title: Complete your profile
onboarding.subtitle: Tell us a bit about yourself before entering the community.
onboarding.usernameHint: Lowercase letters, numbers and underscores only. Between 3 and 20 characters.
onboarding.displayNameHint: How other forum members will see you.
onboarding.errorUsernameTaken: That username is already taken. Choose another.
onboarding.errorUsernameInvalid: Lowercase letters, numbers and underscores only. Between 3 and 20 characters.
onboarding.errorGeneric: We couldn't save your data. Try again.

cta.title: Create your account to join
cta.subtitle: Enter the local forums and connect with the Cerritos community.
cta.microcopy: Free and no passwords. Approval in under 24h.

events.title: Events & meetings
events.description: See what's happening around Cerritos: local events, community meetings and plans.

services.title: Jobs & services
services.description: Find or recommend who's good: gardening, maintenance, cleaning and local trades.

reports.title: Reports & lost items
reports.description: Recover what's lost and report what needs fixing on the beach.

forums.title: Community topics
forums.subtitle: We're starting with jobs. The rest will open as we grow.
forums.stubBody: You'll be able to post and connect with other members here soon. In the meantime, subscribe to the newsletter to know when it's ready.

trabajos.title: Jobs
trabajos.description: Recommendations, offers and requests for local services.

eventos.title: Events & meetings
eventos.description: What's being organized in Cerritos and around.

reportes.title: Reports & improvements
reportes.description: Trash, leaks, ideas to take care of the beach.

finalCta.title: Create your account and enter the forums
finalCta.subtitle: It's free and you only need your email. We approve quickly so you can start connecting.

authModal.title: Join to participate
authModal.subtitle: Create an account or sign in to reply and post in the forums.

suspendedAlert.title: Account pending approval
suspendedAlert.body: Your account has not been approved yet. We'll email you when you can start participating.

login.title: Sign in to your account
login.subtitle: Sign in with your email and password or with Google.
login.errorInvalidCredentials: Incorrect email or password. Please try again.
login.errorEmailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email first. Check your inbox.
login.errorAccountSuspended: Your account has been suspended. Contact us for more information.
login.errorSupabase: We couldn't sign you in. Please try again in a few seconds.
login.errorOauth: We couldn't connect with Google. Please try again.
login.errorMissingCode: The link appears invalid or expired. Please try again.

registro.title: Create account
registro.subtitle: Sign up with your email and password or with Google.
registro.errorInvalidInput: Please check the fields and try again.
registro.errorEmailInUse: This email is already registered. Try signing in.
registro.errorSupabase: We couldn't create your account. Please try again.
registro.errorOauth: We couldn't connect with Google. Please try again.
registro.confirmBody: We sent an email to {email}. Click the link to confirm your account.
registro.confirmTip: If you don't see the email, check your spam folder.
registro.resendError: We couldn't resend the email. Please try again.

confirm.title: Confirm your account
confirm.subtitle: Click the button below to activate your Cerritos Beach account.
confirm.errorBody: We couldn't confirm your account. Please try again.
confirm.errorExpiredBody: This confirmation link has already been used or has expired. Sign up again to receive a fresh link.

resetPassword.title: Reset your password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we will send you a link to reset your password.
resetPassword.sentBody: If {email} is registered, you will receive a link to reset your password.
resetPassword.sentTip: If you do not see the email, check your spam folder.
resetPassword.newPasswordSubtitle: Enter and confirm your new password.
resetPassword.successBody: Your password was changed successfully. You can now sign in.
resetPassword.errorInvalidInput: Please check the fields and try again.
resetPassword.errorNotAuthenticated: The link has expired or was already used. Request a new one.
resetPassword.errorSupabase: We could not update your password. Please try again.

onboarding.title: Complete your profile
onboarding.subtitle: Tell us what to call you before entering the community.
onboarding.usernameHint: Lowercase letters, numbers and underscores only. Between 3 and 20 characters.
onboarding.displayNameHint: How other forum members will see you.
onboarding.errorUsernameTaken: That username is already taken. Choose another.
onboarding.errorUsernameInvalid: Lowercase letters, numbers and underscores only. Between 3 and 20 characters.
onboarding.errorGeneric: We couldn't save your data. Try again.

settings.title: My account
settings.errorInvalidInput: Please check the fields and try again.
settings.errorNotAuthenticated: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
settings.errorSupabase: We couldn't save your changes. Please try again.
settings.errorPasswordInvalid: Password must be at least 8 characters.
settings.googleProviderMessage: You signed in with Google. To change your password, do it from your Google account.
settings.avatarErrorInvalidType: Only JPG, PNG, or WebP images are allowed.
settings.avatarErrorSupabase: We could not upload the image. Please try again.

realestate.title: Real estate in Cerritos
realestate.subtitle: Carefully selected properties from the area's top brokers.
realestate.disclaimer: Prices and availability are approximate. Confirm with the listing broker.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Questions, suggestions, or want to be featured on Cerritos Beach? Write to us.

message.label: Message
message.placeholder: Tell us how we can help

success.title: Message sent
success.message: Thanks for writing. We'll reply within 48 hours.

newsletter.title: Get the best of Cerritos
newsletter.subtitle: One email a month with surf conditions, events and news. Cancel anytime.
newsletter.success: Done! You're subscribed to the newsletter.
newsletter.error: We couldn't subscribe you. Try again.

footer.tagline: The official guide to Cerritos Beach.

emergency.title: Emergency contacts
emergency.subtitle: Calls and useful services for emergencies in Cerritos, Pescadero and Todos Santos.

location.title: How to Get There
location.directions: From Todos Santos, take federal highway 19 south for 12 km. Turn at the Playa Cerritos sign. About 15 minutes by car.
